content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added dead cell candidate collection — for each living cell, gather all 8 neighbors that aren't already living. Then filter those candidates to keep only ones with exactly 3 live neighbors, and append to survivors.
- Result: All tests now pass (7 passing, 2 todo)
- Approach: Straightforward implementation of the candidate-set strategy. Iterates the 8 neighbor offsets for each living cell to build a deduplicated dead-candidate list, reuses the existing `countLivingNeighbors` helper for the reproduction check, and combines survivors with newly born cells.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_11-02-34_game-of-life-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts
